subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-05-19 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: You must always be the bearers of good news. Spread such news quickly, and become the means through which the hearts are made cheerful and vigilant
subcodes.first_line_orig: همیشه خوش خبر باشید اخبار خوش را همیشه زود منتشر نمائید
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @compassion; kindness, @wisdom [hikmat], @courtesy; culture [adab], @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow
